ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was last modified */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the survey */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  "survey_status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., active, inactive, draft) */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of the survey (e.g., usability, feedback) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the survey */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the product was released */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., desktop application, mobile app) */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., in development, released, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the response */,
  "response_value" REAL /* Value of the user's response (e.g., score from 1 to 5) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was submitted */,
  "response_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments with the response */,
  "response_duration" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the response (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the user (e.g., age, location) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, employee) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "user_last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey for which the analytics are generated */,
  "average_usefulness" REAL /* Average perceived usefulness score */,
  "average_effectiveness" REAL /* Average effectiveness score */,
  "average_visual_attractiveness" REAL /* Average visual attractiveness score */,
  "average_satisfaction" REAL /* Average user satisfaction score */,
  "average_intention" REAL /* Average continuance intention score */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses for the survey */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate for the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the participant is involved in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the survey */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., invited, completed, declined) */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant completed the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_participants_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey concerning the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., technical, design, usability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the notification (e.g., sent, viewed) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* User who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey related to the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment left by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "comment_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the comment (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
